programs.title: The Addams Family
programs.desc: The daughter of a family friend from Spain arrives with marriage on her mind.

programs.title: The Addams Family
programs.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programs.title: Bewitched
programs.desc: With Darrin's meeting quickly approaching, he and Samantha must track down Serena and get her to change Clio back into a human, but Clio is nowhere to be found, and there is no guarantee that she will sign the contract anyway.

programs.title: Bewitched
programs.desc: Endora conjures up a little toy that enchants any human who sees it and is guaranteed to make Darrin and his partners very wealthy.

programs.title: Explore TV
programs.desc: Explore TV takes you around the world to places you'll never forget.

programs.title: Formula E : Highlights
programs.desc: Formula E is more than a just a racing series. Radical cars, all powered by electricity, pave the way for the road cars of tomorrow, with the series acting as a competitive platform to test and develop the latest in electric technology.
